[[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Lieutenant/Legends|Lieutenant]] ''' Geff Blim''' was the weighty personal assistant to [[Carnor Jax]] as well as his secret [[Assassin/Legends|assassin]]. Deadly with a dagger and a skilled sniper in his own right, Blim was tasked by Jax with eliminating his enemies in the [[Imperial Ruling Council/Legends#The .22Council of Blood.22|Imperial Interim Ruling Council]].

==Biography==
He was commonly believed to be mute by those who encountered him; however, his silence, combined with low rank and stature, was purposeful, to allow him to evade others' notice. Jax made him his "Hand" after recalling how [[Mara Jade Skywalker|Mara Jade]] had served [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]].

He later accompanied Jax and [[Redd Wessel|General Wessel]] to [[Phaeda/Legends|Phaeda]] to hunt for the traitorous [[Emperor's Royal Guard/Legends|Imperial Royal Guardsman]], [[Kir Kanos]], and later to [[Yinchorr/Legends|Yinchorr]] where Jax instructed him to snipe Kanos during their ensuing confrontation in [[The Squall/Legends|the Squall]]. Before Blim could do so however, he was shot in the head by [[Sish Sadeet]].
